Document:
# Resomi
Resomi are a small avian raptor species that hail from an icy world. Fast, social, and fragile — they are built for speed and communication, not for combat.
## Biology
Resomi are immune to cold damage thanks to their ammonia-based blood and thick plumage. However, they find temperatures above 30°C unbearably hot, taking [color=#ff4444]30% more heat damage[/color] than other species. They also have weaker bones, resulting in [color=#ff4444]15% more brute damage[/color] taken overall.
Like most non-human species, Resomi can digest raw meat and uncooked animal proteins without issue.
Due to their small size they can fit inside duffelbags, weigh less than most species, and deal Slash damage with unarmed attacks.
## Combat Limitations
Resomi are not built for fighting. They deal [color=#ff4444]15% less melee damage[/color] than other species and suffer from [color=#ff4444]increased weapon recoil[/color], making sustained gunfights unreliable. Play to your strengths — escape, communicate, and let others handle direct confrontation.
## Nesting
Resomi can build a temporary nest using the [color=#aaddff]Nest[/color] action in their action bar.
While nesting: - The Resomi becomes [color=#ffdd88]completely immobile[/color] - Slowly [color=#00cc66]regenerates all damage types[/color] (except genetic and radiation) - Receives [color=#00cc66]reduced incoming damage[/color] - Rapidly [color=#00cc66]recharges their Energy bar[/color]
Nesting has a cooldown after use. Use the [color=#aaddff]Unnest[/color] action to leave the nest early.
## Energy
Resomi have a unique [color=#ffdd88]Energy bar[/color] visible in the HUD. It drains passively over time and can [color=#ff4444]only be recharged by nesting[/color] — not by eating or resting.
[color=#88ff88]● Above 70%[/color] — No penalty [color=#ffdd88]● 40 – 70%[/color] — Slightly slower movement [color=#ff8844]● 10 – 40%[/color] — Noticeably slower movement [color=#ff4444]● Below 10%[/color] — Heavily slowed movement
The bar empties in roughly [color=#ff4444]20 minutes[/color] and fully recharges in [color=#00cc66]2 minutes[/color] of uninterrupted nesting. Plan ahead — find a safe corner to nest before your energy runs out.
## Sprint
Resomi can activate a short [color=#aaddff]Sprint[/color] using the action in their action bar.
Sprinting temporarily increases movement speed at the cost of [color=#ff4444]draining stamina[/color]. If stamina is fully depleted while sprinting, the Resomi will enter stamcrit and suffer a [color=#ff4444]massive speed debuff for 20 seconds[/color] after recovering. Use sprint wisely — burning it at the wrong moment can leave you completely exposed.
## Calling
Resomi can emit a [color=#aaddff]Call[/color] — a short chirp that acts as a directional signal for nearby Resomis.
- Only [color=#00cc66]other Resomis within range[/color] can hear it - Non-Resomi species are completely unaware of the signal - Recipients receive a private message with the [color=#ffdd88]caller's name[/color] and [color=#ffdd88]compass direction[/color] (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW)
Use it to coordinate with fellow Resomis, call for help, or arrange a meeting point — without alerting the rest of the crew.
## Summary
[color=#00cc66]✦ Immune to cold damage[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Can nest to heal and recharge Energy[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Sprint ability for quick escapes[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Hivemind-style Calling between Resomis[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Can digest raw meat[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Fits in duffelbags[/color]
[color=#ff4444]✦ Suffers above 30°C — takes 30% more heat damage[/color] [color=#ff4444]✦ Takes 15% more brute damage[/color] [color=#ff4444]✦ 15% less melee damage and higher weapon recoil[/color] [color=#ff4444]✦ Energy bar drains every 20 minutes — must nest to recharge[/color] [color=#ff4444]✦ Oversprinting causes stamcrit and 20s speed debuff[/color]
